name: Arena Park
description: Arena Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cape Girardeau, MO. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Cape Girardeau Country Club
description: Come play pickleball at Cape Girardeau Country Club in Cape Girardeau, MO! There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. A membership is required to play.

name: City Of Jackson Civic Center
description: City Of Jackson Civic Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jackson, MO. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Freedom Fitness
description: Freedom Fitness is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MO. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Jackson High School
description: Jackson High School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jackson, MO. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Jackson Middle School
description: Jackson Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jackson, MO. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Litz Park
description: Litz Park is a place to play pickleball in Jackson, MO. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Osage Centre
description: Osage Centre is a place to play pickleball in Cape Girardeau, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Shawnee Park Center
description: Shawnee Park Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cape Girardeau, MO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: The Pickleball Factory
description: The Pickleball Factory is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cape Girardeau, MO. There are 14 indoor concrete and acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The courts can be reserved. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, lights, food, restrooms, water, youth programming, and adaptive programming.
